test-code.description: Test message
Collection methods (from UselessPureMethodCall)
Throwable methods (formerly rule AvoidLosingExceptionInformation) (from UselessPureMethodCall)
#5881 [java] AvoidLosingExceptionInformation does not trigger when inside if-else (from UselessPureMethodCall)
String methods (from UselessPureMethodCall)
useless operation on BigDecimal (from UselessPureMethodCall)
useless operation on BigInteger (from UselessPureMethodCall)
using the result, so OK (from UselessPureMethodCall)
using the result in a method call, so OK (from UselessPureMethodCall)
BigInteger obtained from compound method call (from UselessPureMethodCall)
Using generics on List, OK (from UselessPureMethodCall)
BigInteger in conditional statement (from UselessPureMethodCall)
1702782, Immutable used in comparison (from UselessPureMethodCall)
String calls in expressions (from UselessPureMethodCall)
String::getChars is allowed (from UselessPureMethodCall)
BigInteger calls in expression (from UselessPureMethodCall)
2645268, ClassCastException using Annotation on Local Field (from UselessPureMethodCall)
[java] UselessOperationOnImmutable various false negatives with String #4513 (from UselessPureMethodCall)
[java] UselessOperationOnImmutable should detect java.time types #5244 (from UselessPureMethodCall)
[java] UselessOperationOnImmutable should detect java.time types #5244 - Duration, Period (from UselessPureMethodCall)
False positive for package private method calls in openjdk (from UselessPureMethodCall)
#6055 Atomic increments (from UselessPureMethodCall)
#6060 Stream methods with side-effects (from UselessPureMethodCall)
failure case (from CheckSkipResult)
failure case - read() is as problematic as skip()
failure case but obfuscated (from CheckSkipResult)
return value is assigned to a variable (from CheckSkipResult)
return value is used in a function (from CheckSkipResult)
return value is returned (from CheckSkipResult)
NPE when using Pattern matching variables #3169 (from CheckSkipResult)
#5207 FP with skip overload on custom FileInputStream class (from CheckSkipResult)
If a method is annotated with @anypackage.CheckReturnValue, the return value should be checked
If a method is in a class annotated with @anypackage.CheckReturnValue, the return value should be checked
If a method is in a class in a package annotated with @anypackage.CheckReturnValue, the return value should be checked
With different annotations, nothing needs to be checked
